query:
SELECT UPPER(TRIM(nomeAgente)) as nome_norm, REGEXP_REPLACE(cpfAgente, '[^0-9]', '') as cpf_norm, COUNT(*) as total, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids
FROM agentes
WHERE nomeAgente IS NOT NULL AND cpfAgente IS NOT NULL AND cpfAgente != ''
GROUP BY UPPER(TRIM(nomeAgente)), REGEXP_REPLACE(cpfAgente, '[^0-9]', '')
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT UPPER(TRIM(nomeAgente)) as nome_norm, REGEXP_REPLACE(cpfAgente, '[^0-9]', '') as cpf_norm, COUNT(*) as total, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids
FROM agentes
WHERE nomeAgente IS NOT NULL AND cpfAgente IS NOT NULL AND cpfAgente != ''
GROUP BY UPPER(TRIM(nomeAgente)), REGEXP_REPLACE(cpfAgente, '[^0-9]', '')
